mapper.select: SELECT major_category, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'FAIL') AS fail_count FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND major_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY major_category ORDER BY major_category

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'FAIL') AS fail_count FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
